summary: Iteration 56 testing: Verified all 3 new features - RichHtmlEditor 3 tabs in Article Templates, Brand Colors (7 new color fields in Website Content > Branding), and Article Categories 4th sub-tab with full CRUD. All 21 backend tests and all frontend tests passing.

issues: Minor: Background color field shows '#ffffff' which blends with white page background when color swatch is displayed - purely cosmetic, no functionality issue

critical_code_review_comments: article_categories.py GET /api/article-categories requires admin auth (intentional), public endpoint at /article-categories/public for customer-facing use - correct design

ArticlesTab.tsx: SCOPE_FINAL set only checks hardcoded 'Scope - Final Lost' and 'Scope - Final Won' strings. If a DB category has is_scope_final=True but a different name, price validation won't be enforced. Minor gap - could be enhanced to also check is_scope_final flag from dynamicCategories.
ArticlesTab.tsx line 216: SCOPE_FINAL.has(form.category) only checks hardcoded set - dynamic categories with is_scope_final=True won't trigger price requirement
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test categories (TEST_Category_Basic, TEST_Category_ScopeFinal, TEST_DynCat_Article, TEST_Cat_WithArticle) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter56 features working: (1) RichHtmlEditor 3-tab editor (Rich Text/HTML/Preview) is in Article Templates form AND article create/edit form, tabs switch correctly with content sync. (2) Brand Colors: 9 color fields visible (Primary, Accent, Danger, Success, Warning, Background, Text, Border, Muted) in Website Content > Branding, all backed by /api/admin/settings endpoint. (3) Article Categories: 4th sub-tab in Articles admin with full CRUD - Add/Edit/Delete working, colour picker (10 presets + custom color input), is_scope_final checkbox, slugs auto-generated. (4) Article create/edit form shows dynamic DB categories from /api/article-categories. Previous test: iteration_55.json (RichHtmlEditor, Cart, AdminPanel header, BankTransaction form).
